summary: Iteration 45 - Tested all PDF/CSV export endpoints across GreenLink project. All 19 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed. Key bugs fixed: 1) certifications=None join error in EUDR PDF, 2) Unicode chars causing fpdf crashes in ICI PDF, 3) Missing generate_ssrte_report method in pdf_service.py.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: /api/cooperative/reports/eudr/pdf - Returns valid PDF (certifications=None bug fixed with 'or []' pattern)
VERIFIED: /api/cooperative/carbon-premiums/report-pdf - Returns valid PDF for monthly payments
VERIFIED: /api/farmer-cards/export-pdf - Returns valid PDF for cooperatives with members
VERIFIED: /api/ici-pdf/summary-report - Returns valid PDF (Unicode sanitize_text() function working)
VERIFIED: /api/ssrte/reports/pdf/{cooperative_id} - Returns valid PDF (generate_ssrte_report method added)
VERIFIED: Frontend /cooperative/reports page loads correctly with Export PDF EUDR, Export CSV, Rapport Carbone buttons
VERIFIED: PDF download from frontend works - file rapport_eudr_2026-03-19.pdf downloaded with success toast

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI flows working, PDF download working)

cooperative_1_alain_yao.notes: No members - used for EUDR/Carbon PDF tests

cooperative_2_coop_gagnoa.notes: Has members - used for farmer-cards PDF test

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified all PDF/CSV export endpoints work correctly. Key fixes applied: 1) pdf_service.py - Added generate_ssrte_report method for SSRTE reports, 2) ici_pdf_reports.py - Added sanitize_text() helper and overrode cell/multi_cell to handle Unicode chars (accents, bullets) that were crashing fpdf, 3) cooperative.py line 1524 - Fixed certifications join using 'or []' pattern for None values. All exports now return valid PDF (starting with %PDF) or CSV content.

unicode_chars_ici_pdf.fix: Added sanitize_text() helper and overrode cell/multi_cell in ICIReport class

missing_generate_ssrte_report.fix: Added generate_ssrte_report() method to PDFReportGenerator class
